name: memory-writer-first-engine-run
title: First memory-writer execution via the engine in A-Guy
hook: Proves the memory-writer job runs end-to-end under the kody engine in A-Guy.
body:
Synthetic sticky note used to verify that the memory-writer job, when scheduled by the kody engine (not a local Python invocation), drains the inbox and commits the result.

If you are reading this file at `.kody/memory/memory-writer-first-engine-run.md` with frontmatter and an entry in INDEX.md, the engine integration is working in A-Guy.
